name: opoojkk--swagger-v2-retrofit-generator
description: Generate Android Retrofit/Kotlin client code from Swagger v2 (OpenAPI 2.0) API documentation. Supports fetching Swagger docs via HTTP with no auth, Basic Auth, Bearer Token, and API Key auth. Use when: (1) User needs to generate Retrofit Service interfaces from Swagger API, (2) User wants to create Kotlin data classes from Swagger definitions, (3) User needs to fetch Swagger v2 docs from a URL with authentication, (4) Converting Swagger API documentation to Android HTTP client code.
